                                                                                                                                             1 / 23 
                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                              Introduction                                                              
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
            ██ Who even is this guy?                                                                                                                
                                                                                                                                                    
               •  Software Engineer @iHeart                                               Here is me with me cat, Fritzy =3                         
               •  Keyboard and ergonomics enthusiast                                                                                                
               •  Die hard terminal fanboy                                                                                                          
               •  Loves typesystems and statically typed languages (Yes... Even                                                                     
                  Typescript)

         
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                             2 / 23 
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                            What is Gleam?                                                            
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
            From gleam.run (https://gleam.run/):                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
            ▍ Gleam is a friendly language for building type-safe systems that scale!                                                               
                                                                                                                                                    
            ██ Power of Functional Programming                                ██ Flexible Runtime                                                   
                                                                                                                                                    
            Gleam is a purely functional language. Immutable data,            You can compile Gleam for one of two targets:                         
            powerful type system, simple syntax combine to give a                                                                                   
            developer experience that sparks joy.                                •  Erlang                                                          
                                                                                    ◦  Leveraging the power of the BEAM VM, the Erlang              
            ██ Batteries Included                                                      target can make use of the Open Telephony                    
                                                                                       Protocol (or OTP) to handle massivly concurrent              
            Gleam comes with many great built in tools to handle all                   systems that fail gracefully.                                
            stages of development.                                               •  Javascript                                                      
                                                                                    ◦  For when you want to run your Gleam code inside a            
               •  Language Server                                                      browser, or even interop with JS/TS packages. The            
               •  Formatter                                                            Gleam compiler will even generate Typescript type            
               •  Editor Integrations                                                  definitions for your code.                                   
               •  Package Manager                                                                                                                   
                                                                                                                                                    
            ██ Helpful Error Messages                                                                                                               
                                                                                                                                                    
            The Gleam compiler aims to assist you with any errors.                                                                                  
            Gone are the days of the cryptic 10 page long Typescript                                                                                
            errors.                                                                                                                                 
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                             3 / 23 
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                Functional Programming 101                                                
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
            ██ Declarative Design                                             ██ Immutable Data                                                     
                                                                                                                                                    
            Functional languages are declarative. They aim to describe        Bindings in functional languages are immutable. This is               
            what should happen, not necisarrily how that happens[1].          just a fancy way of saying their data cannot change.                  
                                                                                                                                                    
            ██ Composition and Higher Order Functions                         ██ Pure Functions                                                     
                                                                                                                                                    
            In a functional language, functions can take other                Functions cannot have side effects[2]. Meaning for any                
            functions as parameters. As such, your logic is a series          given input a function will always return the same output.            
            of compositions of functions, rather than lists of                                                                                      
            instructions.                                                                                                                           
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
               1. There is definitely overlap here, especially in multi-paradigm languages, such as Typescript.                                     
               2. Modern functional programs have mechanisms to interact with side effects but that's a little out of scope here.                   
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                             4 / 23 
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                   Modules                                                                   
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
            Gleam code is split into modules. Each module is comprised of functions, types, constants, etc. Each module relates to a                
            specific file in the src directory of a gleam project. For instance, let's say you have file called world.gleam inside of a             
            directory called hello/ in your src directory.                                                                                          
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
            When writing definitions you can use the pub keyword to                                                                                 
            specify what you want to be available in other modules.                 // Will be available outside of this module                     
            Definitions not prefixed with pub are only available from               pub fn my_function() {                                          
            within that module.                                                         todo                                                        
                                                                                    }                                                               
            This would be similar to the following Typescript                                                                                       
                                                                                    // Only available within this module                            
                                                                                    fn module_function() {                                          
                  export function my_function() {                                       todo                                                        
                      //...                                                         }                                                               
                  }                                                                                                                                 
                                                                                                                                                    
                  function module_function() {                                                                                                      
                      //...                                                                                                                         
                  }                                                                                                                                 
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                             5 / 23 
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                   Imports                                                                   
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
            To import a module you would use the import keyword inside of another module.                                                           
                                                                                                                                                    
            Gleam                                                             Typescript                                                            
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                  import hello/world                                                import world from "hello/world"                                 
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
            You can also alias your imports using the as keyword if you want to use a different name.                                               
                                                                                                                                                    
            Gleam                                                             Typescript                                                            
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                  import hello/world as wrld                                        import wrld from "hello/world"                                  
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
            Alternatively you can import specific parts of a module using unqualified imports using the .{name} syntax.                             
                                                                                                                                                    
            Gleam                                                             Typescript                                                            
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                  import hello/world.{my_function}                                  import {my_function} from "hello/world"                         
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                             6 / 23 
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                    Values and Assignments                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
            In Gleam the concept of variables doesn't really exist, as values are immutable. However, you can still assign values to                
            identifiers for easy reuse within your functions:                                                                                       
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                   let a = 4                                                                                        
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
            Identifiers in Gleam are written using snake_case. So where in Typescript it is entirely up to the developers (And people               
            seem to generally prefer camelCase or PascalCase), this name convention is enforced by the Gleam compiler.                              
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                   // Invalid, will get a compiler error                                                            
                                                   let helloWorld = "Hello, World!"                                                                 
                                                   // Correct                                                                                       
                                                   let hello_world = "Hello, World!"                                                                
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
            Like Typescript, type annotations are also optional in Gleam:                                                                           
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                   let a = "a"                                                                                      
                                                   // is the same as                                                                                
                                                   let a: String = "a"                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                             7 / 23 
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                 Functions                                                                 
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
            Functions are the core of Gleam programs. You use the fn keyword to define a function in Gleam. Unlike in Typescript, type              
            annotations on function parameters are optional in Gleam. This is because the type system is able to look at how the                    
            parameters are used to infer their types. However, it is still considered good practice to include type parameters on                   
            functions. You use the -> syntax to specify a return type:                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                   fn double(a: Int) -> Int {                                                                       
                                                       a * 2                                                                                        
                                                   }                                                                                                
                                                   // Is the same as                                                                                
                                                   fn double(a) {                                                                                   
                                                       a * 2                                                                                        
                                                   }                                                                                                
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
            Another thing to notice is that Gleam uses implicit returns. Whatever the last expression in a block is will be returned.               
                                                                                                                                                    
            Gleam also has anonymous functions. These are very helpful when you are passing a function into another function as a value:            
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                   higher_order_function(fn(x) {x + 1})                                                             
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                             8 / 23 
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                           Pipelines and Function Captures                                           
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
            One of the most powerful features of functional languages is the ability to create pipelines of functions, where the output             
            of the previous function becomes the input for the next. Gleam uses the |> operator for this. For example, if we wanted to              
            create a pipeline that used a double function into a sqrt function:                                                                     
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                   let doubled_sqrt = double(4) |> sqrt                                                             
                                                   // The same as sqrt(double(4))                                                                   
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
            When you combine this with function captures which allow you to take a function, give it some arguments, and get back                   
            another function that takes a subset of arguments that you can call later. For instance, let's say we had a pow(num, power)             
            function that raises a number to a power. We could use a function capture to turn that into a cube function to reuse later:             
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                   let cube = pow(_, 3)                                                                             
                                                   let two_cubed = cube(2) // Same as pow(2, 3)                                                     
                                                   let five_cubed = cube(5) // Same as pow(5, 3)                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                             9 / 23 
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                              Flow Control                                                              
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
            Handling branching conditions is vital for software. In Typescript you would use features like if/else or switch statements.            
            In Gleam you get a supercharged version of switch statements called Pattern Matching. You use the case keyword to create a              
            pattern match, and inside you must handle all possible branches.                                                                        
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                   fn is_a_or_z(str: String) -> Bool {                                                              
                                                       case str {                                                                                   
                                                           "a" | "z" -> True                                                                        
                                                           _ -> False                                                                               
                                                       }                                                                                            
                                                   }                                                                                                
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
            In typescript this might look something like:                                                                                           
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                   function is_a_or_z(str: string): boolean {                                                       
                                                       if (str === "a" || str === "z") {                                                            
                                                           return true;                                                                             
                                                       }                                                                                            
                                                       return false;                                                                                
                                                   }                                                                                                
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                            10 / 23 
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                 Recursion                                                                 
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
            Gleam also doesn't include loops as there is no way to modify values to handle looping conditions. As such we use recursion.            
            This is simply a functional calling itself until a base case is met. For instance if we wanted to loop through all the                  
            numbers from 0-5 and print them in Typescript you might do:                                                                             
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                   function printTilFive() {                                                                        
                                                       for(let i = 0; i <= 5; i++) {                                                                
                                                           console.log(i)                                                                           
                                                       }                                                                                            
                                                   }                                                                                                
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
            In Gleam you would need to use recursion for this:                                                                                      
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                   fn print_til_five(val: Int) -> Nil {                                                             
                                                       case val {                                                                                   
                                                           val if val <= 5 && val >= 0 -> {                                                         
                                                               echo val                                                                             
                                                               print_til_five(val + 1)                                                              
                                                           }                                                                                        
                                                           _ -> Nil                                                                                 
                                                       }                                                                                            
                                                   }                                                                                                
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                            11 / 23 
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                              Simple Types                                                              
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
            Gleam ships with a number of "simple" types. These include:                                                                             
                                                                                                                                                    
               •  String                                                                                                                            
               •  Int                                                                                                                               
               •  Float                                                                                                                             
               •  Bool                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                    
            This is pretty similar to Typescript, except that instead of a unified number type, our numbers are split into the Int and              
            Float types. This can be simplified down to whole numbers vs rational numbers.                                                          
                                                                                                                                                    
            Each of these primitive types also has their own module included in the standard library (or stdlib). These give you all of             
            the utility functions that might exist on the prototype for the value, like in Typescript.                                              
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
              import gleam/string                                               let str = "the quick brown fox jumped over the lazy                 
              let str = "the quick brown fox jumped over the lazy               dog"                                                                
              dog"                                                              let words = str.split(" ")                                          
              let words = str |> string.split(" ")                                                                                                  
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                            12 / 23 
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                           Type parameters                                                           
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
            --> Just like in Typescript, Gleam supports type parameters, aka generics. They are specified using () after a type that                
            accepts generics.                                                                                                                       
                                                                                                                                                    
            ██ Typescript                                                     ▓▓▓ Gleam                                                             
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                  type MyList<T> = T[]                                              type MyList(T) = List(T)                                        
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
            Unlike in Typescript, the Gleam compiler is smart enough to know when a type in a function declaration is a type parameter              
            without any special syntax                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                    
            ██ Typescript                                                     ▓▓▓ Gleam                                                             
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                  function generic<T>(t: T) {                                       fn generic(t: T) {                                              
                      //...                                                             //...                                                       
                  }                                                                 }                                                               
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                            13 / 23 
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                 List Type                                                                 
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
            Lists are basically Typescript arrays. They use a very similar syntax as well. However, in Gleam all elements of the list               
            must be the same type and you cannot index into a List type directly (since they are implemented with linked lists).
