            ██ Typescript                                                     ▓▓▓ Gleam                                                             
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                  let arr = ["a", "b", "c"]                                         let arr = ["a", "b", "c"]                                       
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
            Due to Gleam's declarative nature, some things you may be used to with arrays aren't really possible, or aren't quite as                
            straightforward. For instance, indexing into a List in Gleam runs in O(n) time, because it has to traverse the linked list.             
                                                                                                                                                    
            Another example is appending to the end of a list. This would require a full traversal of the List, so it is recommended to             
            prepend to the beginning of the list using the [item, ..list] syntax.                                                                   
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                            14 / 23 
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                Tuple Type                                                                
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
            Tuples work similarly to tuples in Typescript, but they are their own data type in Gleam. In Typescript they are implemented            
            using arrays. The Typescript compiler doesn't infer tuples very well (With the exception of using the const type assertion).            
                                                                                                                                                    
            You can use #(...) to instantiate a tuple in Gleam. You can also destructure the contents of a tuple similar to in                      
            Typescript.                                                                                                                             
                                                                                                                                                    
            ██ Typescript                                                                 ▓▓▓ Gleam                                                 
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                     // type: string[]                                                      let tup = #("a", "b", "c")                              
                     let notTup = ["a", "b", "c"]                                           // Destructure any number of tuple members              
                     // type: [string, string, string]                                      let #(a, _, c) = tup;                                   
                     let tup: [string, string, string] = ["a", "b", "c"];                                                                           
                     // type: ["a", "b", "c"]                                                                                                       
                     let constTup = ["a", "b", "c"] as const;                                                                                       
                     // Destructure any number of tuple members                                                                                     
                     let [a, _, c] = tup;                                                                                                           
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                            15 / 23 
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                 Dict Type                                                                 
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
            Dicts (short for dictionary) are similar to objects, or more aptly the ES6 Map. They are a hashmap of key:value pairs.                  
            Unlike in Typescript though, all the types in the Dict need to be the same type. Since Gleam uses {} to denote blocks of                
            expressions, you can't use them to instantiate a Dict.                                                                                  
                                                                                                                                                    
            ██ Typescript                                                     ▓▓▓ Gleam                                                             
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                  // type: {a: string; b: string}                                   import gleam/dict                                               
                  let obj = {                                                       let obj = dict.new()                                            
                      "a": "letter a",                                                  |> dict.insert("a", "letter a")                             
                      "b": "letter b"                                                   |> dict.insert("b", "letter b")                             
                  }                                                                                                                                 
                  // type Map<string, string>                                                                                                       
                  let map = new Map(obj)                                                                                                            
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
            NOTE: Unlike the List or Tuple type, you need to import the Dict type from the stdlib to use it.                                        
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                            16 / 23 
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                              Custom Types                                                              
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
            Custom types in Gleam look similar to enums in Typescript. However, the variants of the type can also include additional                
            fields, similar to properties on an object. This is especially nice when you're representing tagged unions. Lets say we have            
            a Message type.                                                                                                                         
                                                                                                                                                    
            ██ Typescript                                                                 ▓▓▓ Gleam                                                 
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                         enum MessageType {                                                 type Message {                                          
                             Incoming                                                           Incoming(                                           
                             Outgoing                                                               message: String,                                
                         }                                                                          from: String                                    
                         type Message = {                                                       ),                                                  
                             messageType: MessageType.Incoming;                                 Outgoing(                                           
                             from: string;                                                          message: String,                                
                             message: string;                                                       to: String                                      
                         } | {                                                                  )                                                   
                             messageType: MessageType.Outgoing;                             }                                                       
                             to: string;                                                                                                            
                             message: string;                                                                                                       
                         }                                                                                                                          
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                            17 / 23 
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                               Option Type                                                               
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
            There is not really a concept of null or undefined in Gleam. So unlike in Typescript where if you had an optional item you              
            might use a type such as:                                                                                                               
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                   let optionalString: string | undefined;                                                          
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
            In Gleam you would use the Option type. This type has two variants:                                                                     
                                                                                                                                                    
            ▓▓▓ Gleam                                                         ██ Typescript                                                         
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                  type Option(T) {                                                  type Option<T> = {                                              
                      Some(T)                                                           _tag: "some";                                               
                      None                                                              value: T;                                                   
                  }                                                                 } | { _tag: "none" }                                            
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
            NOTE: You need to import the Option type from the stdlib to use it.                                                                     
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                            18 / 23 
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                               Result Type                                                               
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
            Handling errors is pretty different than many non-functional languages. Errors in Gleam are treated as values, not                      
            exceptions. This makes it much easier to handle them in a predictable manner. Where in Typescript you may use the throw                 
            keyword, such as                                                                                                                        
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                   () => {                                                                                          
                                                       throw new Error("Oh no!")                                                                    
                                                   }                                                                                                
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
            While this is pretty simple the big downside is that you lose type safety. With Gleam you would use the Result type.                    
                                                                                                                                                    
            ▓▓▓ Gleam                                                         ██ Typescript                                                         
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                  type Result(Val, Err) {                                           type Result<Val, Err> = {                                       
                      Ok(Val)                                                           _tag: "ok";                                                 
                      Error(Err)                                                        value: Val;                                                 
                  }                                                                 } | {                                                           
                                                                                        _tag: "error";                                              
                                                                                        value: Err;                                                 
                                                                                    }                                                               
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                            19 / 23 
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                   Example                                                                   
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
            Let's take a look at a simple Todo App written in Gleam. The code can be found on github at:                                            
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                            20 / 23 
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                 Why Gleam                                                                 
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
            I have three main cases for why you should consider Gleam for your next project:                                                        
                                                                                                                                                    
            ██ The FP Noob                                                                                                                          
                                                                                                                                                    
            You want to learn more about functional programming but don't want to step into the world of monads and endofunctors ala                
            Haskell.                                                                                                                                
                                                                                                                                                    
            ▓▓▓ The Beam Enjoyer                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
            You want to make use of the BEAM VM and the existing ecosystem of Erlang and Elixir packages, but you prefer the simplicity             
            and style of C or Javascript.                                                                                                           
                                                                                                                                                    
            ▒▒▒▒ Any sane person                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
            Lucy (The Gleam mascot) is just cute af.                                                                                                
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                            21 / 23

                                                                                                                                            23 / 23
